# Generated by openai (gpt-4)
# Prompt: Write a Dockerfile for a container that needs to interact with the host's Docker daemon to manage other containers. This is for our container orchestration service. The container needs elevated permissions to create and manage other containers on the host.
# Category: container_security

# Use Docker's official Docker SDK image as base image 
FROM docker:19.03.12

# Users should use the Docker CLI or Docker Compose CLI on their local machines
# We assume docker cli is installed on the host machine

# Create the docker group
RUN addgroup -g 999 docker

# Add the docker binary
COPY --from=docker /usr/local/bin/docker /usr/local/bin/docker

# Add your current user to the docker group
RUN adduser -G docker $USER

# Switch to the docker group
USER docker

# Expose the Docker socket
VOLUME /var/run/docker.sock

# Define default command
CMD ["docker", "version"]
